title: create db
text: create db If the database file does not yet exist, creates a database file in the path specified by the connector setting. USYS$Mnmemonic_PARAMScreate db= on | off Use Applies to Mnemonic Connector Syntax SQLite connector SLE USYS$SLE_PARAMS Description If this option is omitted, the default value is off . Related Links Database Access on SQLite The SLE connector uses the embedded SQLite library to access and manipulate the DBMS file. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
